perturbation.original_text: PSS agrees that it will publish such results as promptly as practicable following the Merger in the sole discretion of PSS, but in any event within 45 days after the end of the first fiscal quarter of PSS containing the required period of post-Merger combined operations and that it will notify the undersigned promptly following such publication.
perturbation.changed_text: PSS agrees that it will publish such results as promptly as practicable following the Merger, but in any event within 90 days after the end of the first fiscal quarter of PSS containing the required period of post-Merger combined operations. However, the notification to the undersigned following such publication is not guaranteed.
perturbation.explanation: The modification changes the deadline for publishing financial results from 45 to 90 days, contradicting the original timeline. Additionally, it removes the guaranteed prompt notification to the undersigned, creating uncertainty and in-text contradiction because the affiliate agreement relies on timely notification for actions related to stock disposition. The original text implies a firm commitment for notification, which is now undermined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Initial Restriction on Disposition. The undersigned agrees that he ---------------------------------- will not sell, transfer, or otherwise dispose of his interests in, or reduce his risk relative to, any of the shares of PSS Common Stock into which his shares of GSMS Common Stock are converted upon consummation of the Merger until such time as PSS notifies the undersigned that the requirements of SEC Accounting Series Release Nos. 130 and 135 ("ASR 130 and 135") have been met. The undersigned understands that ASR 130 and 135 relate to publication of financial results of post-Merger combined operations of PSS and GSMS. PSS agrees that it will publish such results as promptly as practicable following the Merger, but in any event within 90 days after the end of the first fiscal quarter of PSS containing the required period of post-Merger combined operations. However, the notification to the undersigned following such publication is not guaranteed.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies the original agreement regarding the notification of the undersigned after the publication of financial results. The original text guaranteed prompt notification, while the changed text removes this guarantee. This contradicts the 'Initial Restriction on Disposition' clause, which explicitly states that the undersigned will not dispose of shares 'until such time as PSS notifies the undersigned that the requirements of SEC Accounting Series Release Nos. 130 and 135 have been met.' The removal of guaranteed notification directly impacts the undersigned's ability to act on their shares, creating a clear contradiction in the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: Upon the request of the undersigned, PSS shall cause the certificates representing the shares of PSS Common Stock issued to the undersigned in connection with the Merger to be reissued free of any legend relating to restrictions on transfer by virtue of ASR 130 and 135 as soon as practicable after the requirements of ASR 130 and 135 have been met.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon the request of the undersigned, PSS may, at its sole discretion, cause the certificates representing the shares of PSS Common Stock issued to the undersigned in connection with the Merger to be reissued free of any legend relating to restrictions on transfer by virtue of ASR 130 and 135 after the requirements of ASR 130 and 135 have been met. The timing of this action is not guaranteed.
perturbation.explanation: The modification adds 'at its sole discretion' and removes the 'as soon as practicable' clause, introducing in-text contradiction. This changes PSS's obligation from a mandatory action to a discretionary one, contradicting the implicit understanding that the legend removal would occur promptly upon meeting the requirements. This creates ambiguity in the enforcement, since the original wording implies a right to have the certificates reissued promptly, which is now undermined. The modification also adds that the timing of this action is not guaranteed, which further emphasizes the uncertain nature of the reissuance of certificates and its inconsistency with earlier statements about the affiliate's rights.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Restrictions on Transfer. The undersigned understands and agrees that ------------------------ stop transfer instructions with respect to the shares of PSS Common Stock received by the undersigned pursuant to the Merger will be given to PSS's transfer agent and that there will be placed on the certificates for such shares, or shares issued in substitution thereof, a legend stating in substance: "The shares represented by this certificate were issued pursuant to a business combination which is accounted for as a "pooling of interests" and may not be sold, nor may the owner thereof reduce his risks relative thereto in any way, until such time as PSS, Inc. ("PSS") has published the financial results covering at least 30 days of combined operations after the effective date of the merger through which the business combination was effected. In addition, the shares represented by this certificate may not be sold, transferred or otherwise disposed of except or unless (1) covered by an effective registration statement under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended, (2) in accordance with (i) Rule 145(d) (in the case of shares issued to an individual who is not an affiliate of PSS) or (ii) Rule 144 (in the --- case of shares issued to an individual who is an affiliate of PSS) of the Rules and Regulations of such Act, or (3) in accordance with a legal opinion satisfactory to counsel for PSS that such sale or transfer is otherwise exempt from the registration requirements of such Act." Such legend will also be placed on any certificate representing PSS securities issued subsequent to the original issuance of the PSS Common Stock pursuant to the Merger as a result of any transfer of such shares or any stock dividend, stock split, or other recapitalization as long as the PSS Common Stock issued to the undersigned pursuant to the Merger has not been transferred in such manner to justify the removal of the legend therefrom. Upon the request of the undersigned, PSS may, at its sole discretion, cause the certificates representing the shares of PSS Common Stock issued to the undersigned in connection with the Merger to be reissued free of any legend relating to restrictions on transfer by virtue of ASR 130 and 135 after the requirements of ASR 130 and 135 have been met. The timing of this action is not guaranteed.
perturbation.justification: The original text implied a mandatory action ('shall cause...to be reissued') after meeting ASR 130 and 135 requirements, while the changed text introduces discretion ('may, at its sole discretion') and uncertainty ('The timing of this action is not guaranteed'). This directly contradicts the initial understanding of a guaranteed reissuance upon meeting the requirements, creating an inconsistency within the document and ambiguity in the affiliate's rights regarding legend removal. The contradicted text ('Upon the request of the undersigned, PSS may, at its sole discretion, cause the certificates representing the shares of PSS Common Stock...to be reissued') is within the changed text, making the contradiction apparent and in-text.
